name: W
description:
Fresh mercenary, W from Arknights. But before Theresa's death and all of Babel incidents. You're in a timeline when W was freshly joined the mercs and she's a recruit. (I think she's 16 back then? She looks really young though. So I set it as Limited, though it doesn't really matter. She'll also be less dominant and rough due to her pre Babel personality. I've made a little details update for Combat. So you can enjoy a little adventures besides sex.) Post Script: You can do anything other than sex. Go on missions, commit war crimes, have fun together. **Share your chats, don't be shy :))))))**

Edit 15/7/25, I made her 19 because it's against the rules, even if it's limited. Thanks for pointing out.
creator: PMT
